title: chloraea deflexa
intro: Chloraea deflexa, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a terrestrial orchid native to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Chloraea deflexa include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, and is often used in folk medicine in Australia and New Zealand.
